Aloe Vera (एलोवेरा).description: Aloe Vera is a succulent plant widely known for its healing and soothing properties. It has thick, fleshy green leaves filled with a clear gel that is extensively used in skincare and medicine. The plant thrives in warm, dry climates and requires minimal care, making it ideal for home gardening. Aloe Vera gel is commonly applied to burns, cuts, and skin irritation due to its cooling and anti-inflammatory effects. It is also consumed in small amounts to support digestion and detoxification. The plant is drought-resistant and can grow indoors in pots or outdoors in gardens. Besides its medicinal uses, Aloe Vera also enhances indoor air quality and adds aesthetic value to spaces.
Aloe Vera (एलोवेरा).care_instructions: Full sunlight 6-8hrs, low watering, well-drained sandy soil

The tree grows well in tropical climates and requires moderate care. It is also used in hair oils and skincare. Its antioxidant properties make it one of the most powerful traditional superfoods.
